title: Privacy, feedback and diagnostics readiness package
summary: Define M7 privacy, local feedback and diagnostic package readiness without enabling telemetry, accounts, uploads or external services.
acceptance: Defines local feedback and diagnostic package readiness without automatic upload, telemetry, accounts or external services
Carries forward M6 Web local diagnostic pass, Windows host diagnostics blocker and Windows/Web save-container interoperability blocker
Drafts privacy statement boundaries as non-final internal readiness material only
Records what tester data can be manually collected, where it is stored and what remains owner-gated
Does not implement telemetry, crash upload, hosted services, accounts, paid services or final privacy/legal commitments

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until WM-0098 is verified, integrated and done.

objective: Prepare privacy, local feedback and diagnostics boundaries for controlled external testing without creating network services.
forbiddenPaths: telemetry crash-upload account hosted-service or paid-service implementation
final legal privacy or store claims
new runtime dependencies unless approved by ADR
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: diagnostics readiness can accidentally become telemetry; no automatic upload or network service is allowed.
Risk: privacy copy can become final public policy; keep it draft/internal unless owner approval exists.
File ownership is limited to platform diagnostics surfaces, M7 privacy/feedback docs and task reports.
ownerGate: Block on telemetry, accounts, hosted services, crash upload, paid services or network upload
Block on final privacy/legal commitments without owner approval
Block if diagnostics require broad host filesystem access or violate Electron preload boundaries
m0M6RegressionCoverage: Preserve Electron nodeIntegration=false, contextIsolation=true and sandbox=true boundaries
Preserve Web local diagnostic behavior and M6 product-gate blockers
No authoritative simulation, save schema or benchmark baseline change
benchmarkImpact: No baseline change expected. Any diagnostic overhead must remain outside hot simulation paths and be covered by existing quality gates.
reviewRouting: systems-architect completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies no telemetry/upload/accounts or final privacy claims were introduced.
rollbackModel: Revert privacy, feedback and diagnostics readiness docs/surfaces and WM-0102 reports; leave M6 diagnostic evidence intact.

sparkEligibility.reason: Privacy, diagnostics and feedback boundaries touch security and owner-gated public commitments.
